cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
project(mtms_device_bridge)

if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
  # HACK: no-pedantic flag is needed here because NiFpga.h and NiFpga.c trigger compiler warnings
  #   otherwise. Those files are auto-generated by FPGA Interface C API Generator in LabVIEW, so
  #   there is little else that can be done about them, except manually editing the auto-generated code,
  #   which would hurt replicability.
  #
  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wno-pedantic)
endif()

find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
find_package(rclcpp REQUIRED)
find_package(std_msgs REQUIRED)
find_package(std_srvs REQUIRED)
find_package(mtms_device_interfaces REQUIRED)
find_package(mtms_event_interfaces REQUIRED)
find_package(mtms_system_interfaces REQUIRED)
find_package(realtime_utils REQUIRED)

# Run_fpga executable

add_executable(run_fpga
  src/nodes/run_fpga.cpp
  src/lib/fpga.cpp
  src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(run_fpga
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(run_fpga
  PUBLIC
    $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
    $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(run_fpga rclcpp std_msgs mtms_device_interfaces mtms_system_interfaces realtime_utils)

# System state bridge

add_executable(system_state_bridge
        src/nodes/system_state_bridge.cpp
        src/lib/fpga.cpp
        src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(system_state_bridge
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(system_state_bridge
        PUBLIC
        $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
        $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(system_state_bridge rclcpp std_msgs mtms_device_interfaces mtms_system_interfaces realtime_utils)

# Session bridge

add_executable(session_bridge
        src/nodes/session_bridge.cpp
        src/lib/fpga.cpp
        src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(session_bridge
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(session_bridge
        PUBLIC
        $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
        $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(session_bridge rclcpp std_msgs mtms_device_interfaces mtms_system_interfaces realtime_utils)

# Start device handler

add_executable(start_device_handler
  src/nodes/start_device_handler.cpp
  src/lib/fpga.cpp
  src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(start_device_handler
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(start_device_handler
  PUBLIC
    $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
    $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(start_device_handler rclcpp std_msgs std_srvs mtms_device_interfaces realtime_utils)

# Start session handler

add_executable(start_session_handler
        src/nodes/start_session_handler.cpp
        src/lib/fpga.cpp
        src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(start_session_handler
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(start_session_handler
        PUBLIC
        $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
        $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(start_session_handler rclcpp std_msgs mtms_device_interfaces mtms_system_interfaces realtime_utils)

# Stop session handler

add_executable(stop_session_handler
        src/nodes/stop_session_handler.cpp
        src/lib/fpga.cpp
        src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(stop_session_handler
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(stop_session_handler
        PUBLIC
        $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
        $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(stop_session_handler rclcpp std_msgs mtms_device_interfaces mtms_system_interfaces realtime_utils)

# Stop device handler

add_executable(stop_device_handler
        src/nodes/stop_device_handler.cpp
        src/lib/fpga.cpp
        src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(stop_device_handler
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(stop_device_handler
        PUBLIC
        $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
        $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(stop_device_handler rclcpp std_msgs std_srvs mtms_device_interfaces realtime_utils)

# Allow stimulation handler

add_executable(allow_stimulation_handler
  src/nodes/allow_stimulation_handler.cpp
  src/lib/fpga.cpp
  src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(allow_stimulation_handler
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(allow_stimulation_handler
  PUBLIC
    $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
    $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(allow_stimulation_handler rclcpp std_msgs mtms_device_interfaces realtime_utils)

# Allow trigger out handler

add_executable(allow_trigger_out_handler
  src/nodes/allow_trigger_out_handler.cpp
  src/lib/fpga.cpp
  src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(allow_trigger_out_handler
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(allow_trigger_out_handler
  PUBLIC
    $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
    $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(allow_trigger_out_handler rclcpp std_msgs mtms_device_interfaces realtime_utils)

# Event handler

add_executable(event_handler
  src/nodes/event_handler.cpp
  src/lib/serdes.cpp
  src/lib/fpga.cpp
  src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(event_handler
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(event_handler
  PUBLIC
    $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
    $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(event_handler rclcpp std_msgs mtms_event_interfaces mtms_device_interfaces realtime_utils)

# Trigger events handler

add_executable(trigger_events_handler
  src/nodes/trigger_events_handler.cpp
  src/lib/fpga.cpp
  src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(trigger_events_handler
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(trigger_events_handler
  PUBLIC
    $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
    $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(trigger_events_handler rclcpp std_msgs std_srvs mtms_event_interfaces mtms_device_interfaces realtime_utils)

# Feedback monitor bridge

add_executable(feedback_monitor_bridge
  src/nodes/feedback_monitor_bridge.cpp
  src/lib/fpga.cpp
  src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(feedback_monitor_bridge
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(feedback_monitor_bridge
  PUBLIC
  $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
  $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(feedback_monitor_bridge rclcpp std_msgs mtms_event_interfaces realtime_utils)

# Settings handler

add_executable(settings_handler
        src/nodes/settings_handler.cpp
        src/lib/fpga.cpp
        src/lib/NiFpga.c
)

target_link_libraries(settings_handler
  realtime_utils::utils
)

target_include_directories(settings_handler
        PUBLIC
        $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
        $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:include>)

ament_target_dependencies(settings_handler rclcpp std_msgs mtms_device_interfaces realtime_utils)


install(TARGETS
  run_fpga

  system_state_bridge
  session_bridge

  start_device_handler
  stop_device_handler
  start_session_handler
  stop_session_handler

  allow_stimulation_handler
  allow_trigger_out_handler

  event_handler

  trigger_events_handler
  feedback_monitor_bridge
  settings_handler
  DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME})

# Install the launch directory.
install(DIRECTORY
  launch
  DESTINATION share/${PROJECT_NAME}/
)

if(BUILD_TESTING)
  find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
  ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
endif()

ament_package()
